prompt:
You are shown one page from a SEC 10-K filing rendered as an image.
Item "15. Exhibits, Financial Statement Schedules" ENDS on this page; the next section is "Item 16. Form 10-K Summary".
First locate the bottom edge of Item 15's text:
- If the "Item 16" heading is visible on this page, Item 15 ends on the line directly ABOVE that heading.
- Otherwise Item 15 runs all the way to the very bottom of the page.
Then transcribe VERBATIM the LAST 5 lines of Item 15 at that bottom edge — the FINAL lines right before the section ends, NOT lines from the top or middle of the page. Ignore running headers, page numbers, footers.
Output ONLY the transcribed text, no commentary, no quotes, no formatting.
text:
(c) Financial Statement Schedules: None.
ITEM 16. FORM 10-K SUMMARY
None.
85
